title: Chef Aid 12 Cup Large Muffin Pan, Non-Stick Cupcake Tray Baking Mould, Grey, 35 x 26.5 x 3 cm
features: EVERDAY USE: This non-stick, easy clean, 12 Cup Muffin Pan is ideal for making homemade treats. Use this pan for Cupcakes, muffins, appetisers and a wide selection of other swete treats

FREEZER AND FRIDGE SAFE: This essential Muffin pan can store cooked goods in the fridge or freezer; Meaning its ideal for prep and leftovers; Simply take the Muffin pan straight from freezer to oven to cook or reheat ideally every time
NON-STICK: Remove Cooked and baked goods with ease with this quality non stick goldflon coating. The non-stick is PFAS, PTFE and BPA free
DURABLE: This Muffin Pan is made from carbon steel which will prevent warping when cooking all manner of foods, It is long lasting and can be used in high tempertures

CHEF AID: The well known non-stick cookware range is a loved and popular range of products that caters for both domestic and commercial uses; This range of products is essential and built for everyday use
description: From the brand Previous page Chef Aid is the most affordable brand and offers an extensive range of products for the kitchen and home. Chef Aid is based on saving you money without compromising on quality. A complete range of solutions for the home.
